name: Josera Denties With Turkey & Apple 180g
shortDescription: The Josera Denties with Turkey & Apple also contain cellulose, which help to improve the teeth-cleaning effect. They are grain-free for good digestibility, as well as containing beneficial minerals. The clever chew sticks are made in Germany – ensuring reliable quality!
description: Apples not only taste good, but also contain many beneficial nutrients. The Josera Denties with Turkey & Apple contain a portion of fine apple puree, which perfectly complements the delicious taste of turkey. These sticks don’t just offer a fruity note, they also help your dog with its daily oral hygiene! The sticks have a star-shaped structure, which can help to reduce plaque and massage gums as your dog chews. Josera Denties with Turkey & Apple at a glance: Tasty chew snack for adult dogs Fruity: with delicious apple puree Mouth-friendly star shape: can help clean teeth and massage the gums With cellulose: structure can support dental hygiene Hearty taste: with delicious turkey With dried tapioca: a source of carbohydrates with a high level of acceptance Source of valuable minerals Well-tolerated: grain-free Quality product from Germany Ingredients: Vegetable by-products (dried potato, dried tapioca, cellulose), dried turkey protein (14%), apple puree (4%), hydrolysed poultry protein, minerals. Analytical constituents protein 12.0 % fat 2.0 % fibre 4.0 % ash 6.5 % moisture 24.0 % Feeding recommendation: Josera Denties with Turkey & Apple is a supplementary food for adult dogs. Dog’s weight Serving in sticks per day 10kg 0.5 25kg 1.5 35kg 2 Feed as a supplement to a complete diet. Ensure treats are included in your dog’s daily nutritional intake. Fresh drinking water should always be made available.
